Jocelyn Stark
Allegiances
  • House Stark
  • House Royce
  • House Royce of the Gates of the Moon (possibly)[N 1]
Culture Northmen
Born ~198–227 AC[1]
Died or after 212 AC[1]
Father Willam Stark
Mother Melantha Blackwood
Spouse Benedict Royce
Issue Three daughters[2]
Books
  • The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)
  • A Storm of Swords (mentioned)

Jocelyn Stark was the only daughter of Lord Willam Stark and Lady Melantha Blackwood. She was married to Benedict Royce and had children.[3] According to Catelyn Stark, she had three daughters; one married a Waynwood, another a Corbray, and the third might have married a Templeton.[2]

Behind the Scenes[ ]

In the first edition of The World of Ice & Fire, Benedict Royce was listed as Benedict Rogers, but this was confirmed by Elio Garcia to be a typo.[4]

Notes[ ]

  1. ↑ At this time, it is uncertain if the branch Raymar Royce and his son Benedict belong to is the same as the one that Nestor Royce belongs to, or if "junior branch" refers to another branch of House Royce entirely.
